summary: All 5 new features validated end-to-end. Backend /api/ideas returns 6/3 fresh non-repeating Telugu ideas with variety in category/tone. Frontend Idea Radar renders, prefills the form, and shows toast. Poster editor QR toggle (off/maps/whatsapp), Download PDF, image crop sliders (zoom/offsetX/offsetY), and auto-fit long Telugu headline all working. Zero console errors. Existing generate/regenerate/history endpoints still pass.
passed: POST /api/ideas count=6 → 6 items each with title/hook/category/tone/angle, Telugu script present, ≥2 distinct categories and ≥2 distinct tones
POST /api/ideas with empty recent_offers → valid ideas array (≥3)
POST /api/generate, POST /api/regenerate regression → 200 with all 9 Telugu keys
POST /api/history + GET /api/history + DELETE /api/history/{id} regression → all 200 with correct persistence
Home page renders IdeaRadar (data-testid=idea-radar-btn) BELOW the input form (y=1283 > y=1052)
Clicking idea-radar-btn shows Scanning state, then idea-radar-panel with 6 idea-card buttons rendered
Each idea-card shows angle, title (Telugu), hook (Telugu), category · tone
Clicking an idea-card prefills offer-input (Telugu title), category-select (e.g. 'TV Repair'), tone-select (e.g. 'Trust Building') and notes/hook — 'Idea loaded into the form!' toast shown
Poster tab: qr-toggle group renders qr-off, qr-maps, qr-whatsapp buttons
qr-maps (default) renders with 'Scan for Map' label
qr-whatsapp renders QR + 'Scan for WhatsApp' label
Both download-poster-btn (PNG) and download-pdf-btn present side-by-side
Clicking Download PDF triggers real file download (tvreddy-festival-square-2026-07-01.pdf)
Product image upload reveals img-zoom, img-offset-x, img-offset-y sliders
Slider changes update product image transform in real time: zoom=1.8 → scale(1.8); offsetX=15 → translate(15%, ...); offsetY=-10 → translate(..., -10%)
Long Telugu headline (78 chars) stays within poster bounds — width 384 ≤ 448, font auto-shrinks from 48→44px and wraps
Zero console errors during entire flow (generate → poster → QR toggles → sliders → PDF download)
critical_code_review_comments: PosterEditor.jsx defaults qrMode='maps' — request only says 'toggle group has 3 buttons'; default-on is fine but consider if 'off' should be default for privacy on some templates. Minor UX opinion, not a bug.

FitHeadline uses character-count heuristic (not real DOM measurement). Works well for tested cases including 78-char Telugu strings, but very tall stacked wraps could still slightly overflow container height when subtitle+CTA+footer are also tall. Consider a ResizeObserver-based fitter later for extreme cases.

IdeaRadar prefill sends idea.tone/category as raw strings — must match values in TONES/CATEGORIES constants. Verified working for 'TV Repair'/'Trust Building'; if backend returns values not in the select options the <select> silently falls back to first item.
server.py IDEA endpoint hard-clamps count to [3,8]; documented in code but not returned in response. Fine.
seed_data_creation: None — history test creates and cleans up its own TEST_ item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 validated all NEW features from the review: /api/ideas endpoint, Trending Idea Radar UI + prefill, QR toggle (maps/whatsapp/off), Download PDF, image crop sliders, auto-fit Telugu headline. All 6 pytest tests pass in ~30s. Range sliders in React need native input value setter to fire onChange from Playwright (see test script pattern).
